case_title: SAM'S GOLD IMPORTS VS BLESILA, N CEBUANO DBA ZANDRA'S BOUTIQUE.

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BLESILA,  N CEBUANO DBA ZANDRA'S BOUTIQUE.
